name: fit4110-lab04-analytics-docker-packaging
description: FIT4110 Lab 04 - Docker packaging and Newman verification for Smart Campus Analytics

scripts.test:mock: newman run "postman/collections/Analytics_API.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/environments/Analytics Mock.postman_environment.json" -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-lab04-mock.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-lab04-mock.html
scripts.test:local: newman run "postman/collections/Analytics_API.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/environments/Analytics Local.postman_environment.json" -r cli,junit,htmlextra --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-lab04-local.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-lab04-local.html
